Kolla Krishnam Raju
Motivator  ·  Dreamer  ·  Real Talk
Thoughts
01
Luck & Hard Work
Niku luck ledhu! Ni chuttu unna panikirani vaalu kuda baaga settle avtharu kani nuvu avvatledhu, endukante just bcoz Niku "luck" ledhu!! So asal luck eh leni nuvvu time kosam enduku wait chestunnav? Asal niku time anedhe radhu, ni life lo miracles jaragavu andhari life lo jariginatlu… idi ni mind lo pettuko. Niku edhina kavali ante.. gadidha 🫏 la kastapadali. So emina cheyali anukunte ippude start chey.. don't wait for time.
Read more ▾
02
Phone & Future
Nuvu Ippudu phone lo em em chusi entertain avtunnavo - like locations, cars, success, dresses everything… ivanni nuvu reality lo kuda experience cheyochu. Ninnu em aaputundho telusa? Ni phone eh! Kavalante Ippudu oka 30 minutes ni phone pakkana petti just ni future gurinchi alochinchu.. pakka edo oka thought ostadhi. Ide 30 minutes badhulu nuvu roju lo atleast 50% time phone lekunda spend cheste, nuvu phone lo chuse prathidhi 3 yrs lo experience cheyochu. Trust me it works!
Read more ▾
03
Clarity & Action
Andharu Edo okati chestunnaru ani andharni chustu tension avvaku. To be honest, life midha evvariki clarity undadhu. Nuvu evaritho aithe compare cheskoni inferior ga feel avtunnavo vala deggariki velli repu em avtundhi ani adugu.. vaalu niku answer ivvaleru. Clarity anedhi niku naku assal evvariki undadhu. People just keep doing things. So nuvu clarity kosam eduru chustu unte adhi eppatiki radhu. Confusion thone Just do it anthe!
Read more ▾
04
Love & Self Worth
Oka beggar roju mi intiki ochevadu, ah beggar ni chusi nuvu daily athaniki food pedtunde.. ala Konni years ayyaka nuvu ah beggar deggariki food pettadaniki velthe.. "challl naku ni food odhu nuvu odhu, naku inko manchi illu dorikindhi" ani ante.. ni feeling enti? Niku poyedhi emina untadha? Ledhu kada. Endukante nuvu iche place lo unnav kabatti. Alane prema lo kuda anthe.. Prema leni oka beggar ki nuvu entha prema ichina inkoka illu dorikithe vellipothadu. Ikkada niku poyedhi emi undadhu. Prema leni manishiki prema dorakali ante illu illu tirigi adukkovali, kani ni deggara kavalsinantha prema undhi, nuvu iche place lo unnav.. ippudu cheppu evaru badha padali?
Read more ▾
05
Self Respect
Ippudu nuvu okari midha efforts pettav anuko, Appudu vaalu "veelu chala efforts pedtunnaru idi chalu" ani anukuntara? Ledhu.. inka efforts pettali anukuntaru.. bcoz idi human mentality. Ade nuvu okari deggara self respect kolipoye antha digajaarinav anuko? Vaalu next time nuvu inka digajaarali ani expect chestaru.. appudu nuvu vala expectations ni reach avvadaniki ni self respect ni inka inka kolipothav! Efforts entha ayna pettu thappu ledhu, kani ni self respect konchem padipotundhi anipinchina kuda ah pani cheyaku! Self respect is everything.
Read more ▾
06
Mind & Feelings
Oka manishi sankanakipoyadu ani eppudu telustundhi? Eppudu ante.. vadi mind inka vadi feelings control lo lenappudu. Mind control lo unte focused ga em avasaramo ade chestav. Feelings control lo unte addamaina valaki dooram ga untav. Ee rendu cheste.. ni life 99.9% better avtundhi.
Read more ▾
07
Precious Time
Ippudu yamadharma raju ochi, niku just 1 hour matrame time undhi, 1 hr tarwata nuvu chanipothav ani chepte.. Nuvu ni next 1 hour em chestav? Obviously parents tho relatives tho or frds tho ledha nuvu istapadevalatho matladthav… anthe kani, ninnu ignore chesevalatho, ninnu pattinchukoni valatho matladthava? Cheyavu kada! So what I'm about to tell you is — time eppudu aithe chala precious ani niku artam aitadho nuvu paniki rani vaala midha ni time invest cheyavu!
Read more ▾
08
Success
Temporary entertainment kosam permanent success ni sacrifice cheyyaku.
Read more ▾
09
Fear Nothing
Asal nuvu deniki bayapadtunnav cheppu?? Fail aitha ani bayapadtunnava? — ni life lo successful ayna moments cheppu, okkati kuda undadhu.. ante anni failures eh! Judge chestaru ani bayapadtunnava? — okkadu kuda ni venakala ni gurinchi manchiga matladukoru! Cheap ga chustaru ani bayapadtunnava? — ni relatives lo okkaru kuda niku respect ivvadu! Edo kolipotha ani bayapadtunnava? — asal em undhi ani ni deggara kolipodaniki? Ippudu cheppu Asal nuvu deniki bayapadtunnav? Gattiga matladithe nuvu bayapadataniki emi ledhu. Alochinchuko!
